title: 10 health benefits of Astragalus membranaceus (huang qi)
intro: Astragalus membranaceus has health benefits such as enhancing immune function, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Its medicinal properties include saponins, polysaccharides, and flavonoids, which work together to modulate the body's response to stress and infection. For example, Astragalus membranaceus may help individuals with chronic fatigue syndrome or cancer to improve their energy levels and overall well-being, allowing them to better manage daily tasks and activities.
